violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. No sanitizer

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Walls, floors are not smooth and cleanable.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. wood surface not sealed

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Food contact surface needs to be sanitized. Sanitization not available.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Was not sanitized due to no sanitizer in mobile.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. No sanitizer in mobile.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Gray water leaking outside.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Walls, floors and ceiling were coming apart. black tape on floor, countertop not sealed.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Gap between door did not protect against entry of insects/rodents.
